ddls:
CREATE TABLE "media_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media file */,
  "filename" TEXT /* Name of the media file */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the media file in bytes */,
  "created" TEXT /* Date and time the media file was created */,
  "original_path" TEXT /* Original path of the media file */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the media file */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Type of the media file (foreign key to file_types) */,
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Format of the media file (foreign key to file_formats) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the media file in seconds */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for file integrity */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current version of the media file (foreign key to file_versions) */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Last modified date and time of the media file */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the media file (e.g., active, archived, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_files_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("format_id") REFERENCES file_formats ("format_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_files_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES file_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_files_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES file_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the file type (e.g., audio, video) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the file type */,
  "is_supported" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the file type is supported by the system */,
  "default_format" INTEGER /* Default format for the file type (foreign key to file_formats) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_types_default_format FOREIGN KEY ("default_format") REFERENCES file_formats ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the file format (e.g., mp3, ogg) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the file format */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the format is the default for its type */,
  "mime_type" TEXT /* MIME type of the format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the media file the tag is associated with */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the tag */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time the tag was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_tags_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_tags_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES media_files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the media file the version is associated with */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time the version was created */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the version is the current version of the media file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_versions_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES media_files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., content creator, editor, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the media file being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the media file */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time the media file was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the file */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the access was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES media_files ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
